name: ARMOR: Stabilizing On-Policy LLM RL with Off-Policy Anchor Samples

description: arXiv:2607.10481v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has significantly enhanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), yet the training process remains notoriously fragile. In this work, we investigate a critical source of this instability: over-optimization, where models exploit training heuristics at the expense of generalizable reasoning. While r...
author: Kexin Huang, Junkang Wu, Jinda Lu, Shuo Yang, Chiyu Ma, Jiancan Wu, Xiang Wang, Xiangnan He, Guoyin Wang, Jingren Zhou
